data. If the beneficiary does not have Medicare claims for inpatient hospitalization, then CCW 
determines if there are Medicare claims for skilled nursing facility (SNF). For MMLEADS, CCW 
calculates the number of months during the year when the beneficiary was in a SNF. Note that the
